generation_label: A nocturnal, bioluminescent botanical garden layout with flowing water and stone lantern highlights.
concept: A tranquil midnight garden scene transitioning from dark, wet slate tones to glowing organic flora, emphasizing the contrast between cold stone architecture and warm, living light.
narrative: The weapon becomes a cross-section of a secret moonlit courtyard. The stock anchors the scene in a dark, mossy perimeter, while the receiver serves as the primary pond feature, with the magazine acting as a submerged descent into the water.

elements.generation_description: An ornate, moss-covered stone lantern emitting a soft, ethereal cyan glow.
A graceful, semi-translucent koi fish with flowing fins, caught mid-turn in dark water.
Closed and partially blooming lotus flowers with bioluminescent tips.
Vertical, segmented bamboo stalks that serve as grounding frame lines.
Subtle, overlapping circular ripples on a dark, wet-stone texture.
Dark, worn flagstone paving tiles with fine fissures and moss accumulation.
Delicate, trailing willow branches that frame the upper edge of the receiver.
Tiny, scattered pin-points of light creating depth and motion across the canvas.

pattern_notes: Utilize a seamless, dark-to-light gradient across the weapon body to mimic the transition from the dark floor of the garden to the illuminated water surface.
The receiver should prioritize the stone lantern and the koi as the central focus.

stock.narrative_role: The tranquil corner of the garden where the stone lantern sits among bamboo.

receiver.narrative_role: The central pond surface housing the primary glowing koi and lotus.

magazine.narrative_role: The depths of the pond, showing submerged koi and bottom-dwelling patterns.

pistol_grip.narrative_role: Grounded edge of the stone path.

handguard.narrative_role: Overhanging willow branches leading the eye toward the front.

front_assembly.narrative_role: Fading garden edge into the darkness.

barrel_muzzle.narrative_role: Quiet, dark transition to the void.

evaluation_criteria: Clarity of the bioluminescent highlights against the dark slate background.
Natural transition of the koi's flowing form across the magazine curve.
Degree of 'night atmosphere' achieved through the lighting palette.
reference_policy: All visual references to botanical structures and traditional stone lanterns are derived from public domain nature photography and classical garden architecture, avoiding direct emulation of contemporary game artists.
